assertion_results.text: The test change classification analysis is based on comparing base-branch and PR-branch file content (function additions, removals, assertion changes) — the structural and semantic assessment references test file content, not acceptance criteria or task requirements (constraint 1.18)

The structural scan references specific test file content: function names (test_recommend_purls_with_qualifiers, test_recommend_purls_dedup), exact PURL assertion strings ('pkg:maven/org.apache/commons-lang3@3.12?repository_url=https://repo1.maven.org&type=jar' vs 'pkg:maven/org.apache/commons-lang3@3.12'), assertion counts, and contains('?') checks.
